Join Our Team
We are hiring! We are excited to meet talented, driven individuals who are committed to great service and caring for our staff and guests deeply.

Benefits
Competitive wages
Health/ dental benefits (after three months for employees working 30+ hours/week)
Paid sick days
Employee discounts on dining
Staff meal
Full-time
Part-time
Permanent
Flexible- scheduling
Closed holidays



Additional Benefits:
We are an inclusive work environment, that respects and nurtures their employees. We believe in balance, if you want to learn and grow with us we often promote from within and avail our staff with education and professional development opportunities as often as possible.


Kitchen positions: please download and complete the application form below and email it, along with a resume it to jobs@beckta.com jobs@beckta.com


For Front-of-House Management positions, please send your CV to jobs@beckta.com


Server, bar & front of house support positions: please download and complete the application form below and email it, along with a resume to . info@gezelligdining.ca

We look forward to hearing from you soon!
